title: I Release Money Fear from the Family Line
subtitle: An energy statement for ending the pattern of generational financial anxiety
excerpt: A two-minute energy statement for when you feel the weight of money anxiety that has roots in an earlier generation. The release names the inherited fear; the allow opens to a new money story that starts here and moves forward.
sourceNotes: The release-and-allow structure draws from The Money Zone: How To Release Hidden Resistance, Allow Flow And Manifest Millions (Rebecca Page, 2024). Adapted for the Day 60 theme of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).

content.text: A two-minute energy statement for generational money anxiety. Some money fear arrived before you, carried in how the adults around you talked about bills, what happened when there wasn't enough, what 'safe' and 'enough' meant in the house you grew up in. This practice names that pattern and releases it.

I am ready to release all inherited money fear, all generational scarcity, and all patterns of financial anxiety that arrived before I had words for them. I release it now. I release it now. I release it now.
I am ready to align with and allow a new money story that begins with me: ease, confidence, and abundance that ripples forward through my family. I allow it now. I allow it now. I allow it now.
Say each three times, slow, out loud or in your mind.
The release-and-allow structure comes from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024). Adapted for the Day 60 theme of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).
